# AutoME Base Config Reference
#
# This is the annotated reference for every config key AutoTorch accepts.
# The agent copies this (or an existing run's config.yaml) as proposed_config.base
# and applies proposed_config.overrides on top — only the changed keys need to be
# listed in overrides, everything else is inherited from the base.
#
# Format: OmegaConf YAML, loaded by AutoTorch/src/utils/config.py
# Passed to training: torchrun AutoTorch/src/train.py --config <path>


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# EXPERIMENT
# run_dir is derived as:  save_dir / save_name
# AutoTorch creates it automatically; AutoME also copies it into artifacts.experiment_dir
#
# save_dir  — FIXED for the lifetime of an experiment. Set once from EXPNAME (the argument
#             passed to /goal) and never changed between runs.
# save_name — set per-run by the agent to {NNN}_{MMDD}. Do not change save_dir.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
experiment:
  save_dir: /mnt3/repo_and_weights/agent/exp1   # substitute EXPNAME from /goal argument; never change mid-experiment
  save_name: "002_0630"                               # per-run: {NNN}_{MMDD} — MUST be quoted; unquoted parses as octal integer in PyYAML

  # description — agent fills this for every run. It is not used by training but is the
  # permanent record of WHY this run exists. Write:
  #   1. Hypothesis: what you expect this change to do and why
  #   2. Reference: which prior run(s) this builds on and what they showed
  #   3. Rationale: why this direction over alternatives available at this point
  # Example: "Hypothesis: raising weight_decay 0→1e-4 with AdamW should reduce overfit on
  # small subclasses (CP_col 0.91 in 001). Reference: 001_0629 showed Replay subclasses
  # converged well but Colour Print remained high — suggests regularisation gap, not capacity."
  description: "Hypothesis: lowering dataloader shared-memory pressure will let the reference unireplknet_t + legacy_v1 + AdamW/plateau baseline complete, preserving the same model-quality test as 001_0630. Reference: 001_0630 failed before epoch 1 with DataLoader worker bus errors under num_workers=24 and prefetch_factor=10. Rationale: reduce only dataloader concurrency so the next result remains comparable to the intended baseline."


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# MODEL
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
model:
  # --- Backbone ---
  # DiNO v3 Vision Transformers (feature dim):
  #   dinov3_vits16 (384)   dinov3_vits16plus (384)
  #   dinov3_vitb16 (768)   dinov3_vitl16 (1024)   dinov3_vith16plus (1280)
  #   dinov3_vit7b16 (4096) dinov3_convnext_tiny (768)  dinov3_convnext_small (768)
  #   dinov3_convnext_base (1024)  dinov3_convnext_large (1536)
  # UniRepLKNet (feature dim):
  #   unireplknet_n (640)  unireplknet_p (512)  unireplknet_t (640)
  #   unireplknet_s (768)  unireplknet_s_in22k (768)  unireplknet_b_in22k (1024)
  # VAN — Visual Attention Network (feature dim):
  #   van_b0 (256)  van_b1 (512)  van_b2 (512)  van_b3 (512)
  backbone_name: unireplknet_t

  freeze_backbone: false   # true = keep pretrained weights frozen, only train head

  # --- Classification Head ---
  # v1        : LayerNorm → Linear→128 → GELU → Dropout(0.2) → Linear→1
  # legacy    : BN → Linear→128 → GELU → BN → Linear→64 → GELU → Linear→32 → GELU → Linear→1
  # legacy_v1 : Dropout(0.5) → Linear→256 → ReLU → Dropout(0.5) → Linear→256 → ReLU → Linear→1 → Sigmoid
  # legacy_v2 : Linear→256 → ReLU → Dropout(0.3) → Linear→256 → ReLU → Dropout(0.1) → Linear→1 → Sigmoid
  head_type: legacy_v1

  # logits  → use bce_with_logits loss (sigmoid fused into loss, numerically stable)
  # probs   → use bce loss (head outputs probability in [0,1] directly)
  output_type: probs

  task: classification   # only supported value for now


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# TRAINING
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
training:
  batch_size: 16                  # per-GPU batch size
  epochs: 30
  learning_rate: 1.0e-04

  # --- Loss ---
  # bce              : Binary Cross Entropy — requires output_type: probs
  # bce_with_logits  : BCE + sigmoid fused — requires output_type: logits (more stable)
  loss_fn: bce

  # --- Optimizer ---
  # adam   : Adam
  # adamw  : AdamW (decouples weight decay from gradient update — preferred with weight_decay > 0)
  optimizer: adamw

  weight_decay: 0.0               # L2 regularisation; try 1e-4 or 1e-2 with adamw

  training_threshold: 0.5         # decision threshold for APCER/BPCER during training metrics

  # Gradient accumulation — effective batch = batch_size × grad_accumulation_steps
  # Use when GPU memory limits batch_size (e.g. batch=4, accum=4 → effective 16)
  grad_accumulation_steps: 1

  # far_threshold: 0.02           # optional — FAR threshold used by checkpoint selection


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# LR SCHEDULER
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
scheduler:
  warmup_epochs: 2                # linear LR warmup from 0 → learning_rate over N epochs; 0 = disabled

  # decay_type options:
  #   step     : multiply LR by gamma every step_size epochs  (StepLR)
  #   cosine   : cosine anneal LR from initial down to eta_min  (CosineAnnealingLR)
  #   plateau  : reduce LR by factor when val_loss stalls for patience epochs  (ReduceLROnPlateau)
  #   null     : no decay (constant LR after warmup)
  decay_type: plateau

  # --- step decay ---
  gamma: 0.1                      # LR multiplier on each step
  step_size: 10                   # reduce every N epochs

  # --- cosine decay ---
  eta_min: 1.0e-07                # floor LR for cosine

  # --- plateau decay ---
  patience: 5                     # epochs without improvement before reducing LR
  factor: 0.5                     # LR multiplier on plateau trigger
  min_lr: 1.0e-07                 # floor LR for plateau
  min_delta: 1.0e-04              # minimum val_loss change to count as improvement


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# EARLY STOPPING
# Monitors validation loss; stops training if no improvement for patience epochs.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
early_stopping:
  enabled: true
  patience: 12                    # epochs without improvement before stopping
  delta: 1.0e-07                  # minimum val_loss change to count as improvement
  verbose: true


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# DATA
# CSVs must have columns:  path (abs path to image)  |  label (0=genuine, 1=attack)
# Optional column for breakdown.py:  Recapture_Subclass
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
data:
  train_csv: /mnt3/agent_data/Enhancement21v1_ori_train.csv
  val_csv:   /mnt3/agent_data/val_dataset.csv    # used during training; if omitted falls back to eval_csv
  eval_csv:  /mnt3/agent_data/eval_dataset.csv   # held-out set; used by evaluate.py + breakdown.py

  image_type: ori                 # organisational tag, passed through to dataset loader
  train_val_split: 0.9            # only used if val_csv is absent (90% train / 10% val)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# DATALOADER
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
dataloader:
  num_workers: 4
  prefetch_factor: 2
  pin_memory: true
  non_blocking: true
  persistent_workers: true
  drop_last: true                 # required when using BatchNorm layers


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# TRANSFORMS
# Applied to every image before it reaches the model.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
transform:
  image_size: 512                           # final square size fed to model

  normalize_mean: [0.485, 0.456, 0.406]    # ImageNet RGB mean
  normalize_std:  [0.229, 0.224, 0.225]    # ImageNet RGB std

  # version options:
  #   v1 : distortion-resize — stretch image to image_size × image_size (fast, distorts AR)
  #   v2 : center-crop + resize + pad — crops largest center square, resizes, pads to target
  #   v3 : letterbox — scale-to-fit with symmetric zero-padding (no distortion, no crop)
  version: v1


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# CHECKPOINTING
# Saves epoch_{N}.pt after every epoch to {run_dir}/checkpoints/
# Best checkpoint selected by model_selection.py after training ends.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
checkpoint:
  enabled: true
